title: humulus yunnanensis
intro: Humulus yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan hop or Chinese hop, is a species of flowering plant in the hop family (Humulaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan Province in southwestern China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Humulus yunnanensis include tea infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
